title: Ultimate Stairs Mod
description: This mod adds a long named version of Waxed Weathered Cut Copper Stairs. Good luck to craft it in suvival.
body:
Waxed Weathered Cut Copper Stairs is a very long named item in Minecraft, but i wanted to make it even longer. So I came with this mod for you, it adds **Calibrated Soul Fire Petrified Light Weighted Mossy Muddy Magenta Gilded Reinforced Waxed Weathered Cut Copper Stairs** and other blocks that are used to make this.

![stairs crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f8122bc9aa791ce3543507dd3ce4b63b0ca6da3.png)

All items you need to craft this stairs.

![stairs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b7d92d35f1c6a9da2e44082d61355ed4331ddf9.png)


<details>
<summary>How to craft this item?</summary>

![crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aaba3dc28ceae592c5a79e173532d1e7b2793dea.png)

Good luck

</details>
